offer: For medical clinics processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate account balances cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate account balances due to untracked patient payments and claims.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics seeking solutions
Engage on Indie Hackers discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to clinics with a demo video
Participate in forums where clinics share tools
try_it: Let users try monthly tracking and claim reconciliation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
